title: cytisus hirsutus subsp. pumilus
intro: Cytisus hirsutus subsp. pumilus, also known as the dwarf or compact broom, is a shrubby legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cytisus hirsutus subsp. pumilus include its ability to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions or decoctions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
